recommendations.title: Moving
recommendations.overview: Arlo accepts what seems to him to be a dream promotion to Idaho. He soon discovers, however, that moving has its own share of problems.

recommendations.title: Passport to Paris
recommendations.overview: Sent to Paris to visit their grandfather, the twins fall in love with France, not to mention two French boys.

recommendations.title: Girls Just Want to Have Fun
recommendations.overview: Janey is new in town. She soon meets Lynne, a classmate who shares her passion for the local show 'Dance TV'. When a competition is announced to find new Dance TV performers, Janey and Lynne are determined to audition. The only problem is that Janey'

recommendations.title: Police Academy: Mission to Moscow
recommendations.overview: The Russians seek help in dealing with the Mafia from the veterans of the Police Academy. They head off to Moscow, in order to find evidence against Konstantin Konali, who marketed a computer game that everyone in the world is playing.

recommendations.title: Waking the Dead
recommendations.overview: A congressional candidate questions his sanity after seeing the love of his life, presumed dead, suddenly emerge.

recommendations.title: The Singing Detective
recommendations.overview: Tormented and bedridden by a debilitating disease, a mystery writer relives his detective stories through his imagination and hallucinations.

recommendations.title: Billboard Dad
recommendations.overview: High above Hollywood Mary-Kate and Ashley Olsen are playing Matchmakers! One's a surfer. The other's a high diver. When these two sisters team up to find a new love for their newly single Dad, it's a fun-loving, eye-catching California adventure gone

recommendations.title: Cruel Intentions 3
recommendations.overview: Meet Cassie, Jason and Patrick, three amoral college students who, through a series of sexual wagers, take malicious pleasure in ruining the lives of their fellow classmates.

recommendations.title: The Ultimate Gift
recommendations.overview: When his wealthy grandfather finally dies, Jason Stevens fully expects to benefit when it comes to the reading of the will. But instead of a sizable inheritance, Jason receives a test, a series of tasks he must complete before he can get any money.

recommendations.title: Las sirvientas calientes 4
recommendations.overview: When a millionaire becomes a widower, he decides to start looking for a woman through the apps on his phone, not knowing that he has to be very careful for that.
